narrative:
Walnut Twp township has 2,257 registered voters, with 46.8% unaffiliated or lacking primary history. Republican-leaning voters make up 42.4% of registrants and Democratic-leaning voters account for 10.7%, a pronounced Republican lean of 31.7 percentage points.
